scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { try { fs.rmSync(f, { force: true }); } catch {} } const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const exec=process.env.npm_execpath||''; const isPnpm=ua.startsWith('pnpm/') || /(^|[\\/])pnpm(\.cjs)?$/i.test(exec) || /pnpm/i.test(exec); if (!isPnpm) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
